title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Cars24 South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Cars24 South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Cars24 South Asia Partners. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Backend Developer to strengthen our Ghaziabad-based team.

About Cars24 South Asia Partners:
Cars24 South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Microservices

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cars24 South Asia Partners!
